commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is the durable message-field/API contract choice, not an automated code repair.; Cleared: No concrete supply-chain or security defect remains in the diff; the trusted bare-body path is security-sensitive and stays listed as merge risk for maintainer contract approval. (sha=3d663da38ca85ef896e97da2de64d7ef5dba03b9)
commands.review_summary:
Adds top-level trusted inbound-decoration fields and shared resolver plumbing across transcript persistence, Control UI text paths, CLI imported-history dedupe, memory session export, historical LLM replay, and focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +159, Tests +225. Total +384 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main still decorates inbound user content with literal sentinel headers and downstream user-role consumers strip or dedupe by those same strings, so sentinel-shaped user text follows the unsafe path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is the durable message-field/API contract choice, not an automated code repair.

target.title: Doctor: expose device pairing findings
target.body:
## Summary

- expose existing device-pairing Doctor diagnostics as structured `core/doctor/device-pairing` findings
- keep the structured lint check default-disabled, so broad `doctor --lint` behavior is unchanged unless operators use `--all` or explicit `--only`
- keep real device-pairing behavior in the legacy Doctor note path; the structured detector is read-only and does not probe the Gateway in lint mode

## Public contract

No public SDK, plugin manifest, config schema, CLI flag, or persisted data-model contract changes.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/doctor-device-pairing.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (59 tests across 2 shards)
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-device-pairing.ts src/commands/doctor-device-pairing.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/commands/doctor-device-pairing.ts src/commands/doctor-device-pairing.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed`
- `pnpm plugin-sdk:surface:check`
- `pnpm plugin-sdk:check-exports`
- `git diff --check`

## Source CLI proof

Using isolated temp config/state:

- `pnpm openclaw doctor --lint --json --only core/doctor/device-pairing` exited 0, `checksRun: 1`, `checksSkipped: 32`, `core/doctor/device-pairing` findings: 0
- `pnpm openclaw doctor --lint --json` exited 1 because unrelated default checks found baseline issues, `checksRun: 25`, `checksSkipped: 8`, `core/doctor/device-pairing` findings: 0
